message:
docs(cx): document cancellation-vs-draining semantics on race methods

Add doc comments to Cx::race, Cx::race_named, Cx::race_timeout, and
Cx::race_timeout_named clarifying that these methods drop (cancel)
losing futures without awaiting their cleanup. This contrasts with
Scope::race and Scope::race_all which drain losers to ensure full
cleanup.

The distinction matters when racing TaskHandles that hold resources
requiring orderly shutdown — callers should prefer the Scope variants
when the "losers are drained" invariant is needed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
